title: What is Agentic AI? The Future of Autonomous Systems
description: Agentic AI represents a paradigm shift from passive, prompt-based models to autonomous systems capable of reasoning, planning, and executing complex tasks using specialized tools. This evolution transforms AI from a simple tool into a collaborative digital colleague, enabling significant productivity gains while necessitating new frameworks for human oversight and security.

title: What is RAG? A Complete Guide to Building Smarter AI Chatbots
description: RAG chatbots combine AI language models with real-time data retrieval to deliver accurate, context-aware, and up-to-date responses.
